codeReview.summary: The commit correctly adds all six new Event variants, EventBuilder methods, accessor match arms, and serde coverage for VAL-EVT-011/012/013. However, the VAL-EVT-014 requirement is not fully met in this feature: the new PreviousDynamics compensating-strategy fields are introduced but not updated from current-cycle computation.

issues.description: PreviousDynamics.had_compensating_strategy and compensating_strategy_type are copied forward from prev (lines 466-467) rather than derived from current-cycle dynamics, so this feature does not satisfy VAL-EVT-014 ('correctly updated after each computation cycle').
Test comment says 'all 22 event types' while the test vector/assert checks 21 events, which is inconsistent with the code and can confuse future maintenance.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Transcript flow shows implementation edits were made before demonstrating a RED test phase, despite rust-library-worker and AGENTS.md both prescribing tests-first TDD.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl skeleton for session accb39b1-f39b-4f63-9ebb-06a61ba776b7 shows multiple Edit operations in sd-core/src/events.rs and sd-core/src/engine.rs before event tests were added/run; handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure is marked true.

summary: Fail: event enum/builder/accessor/serde work is solid, but VAL-EVT-014 is not fully implemented in this commit because PreviousDynamics compensating-strategy state is not updated from current computation cycle.
